title: Smoky Japanese Stir-Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir-fry that combines the smokiness of bacon with the bold flavors of Japanese cuisine. Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a filling meal.
instructions: 1. Cut the bacon into small pieces and cook in a pan until crispy.
2. Remove the bacon from the pan and set aside.
3. Add the smoky stir-fry paste to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add the ginger and garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add the Japanese rice to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
6. Add the soy sauce and sesame oil to the pan and stir to combine.
7. Add the cooked bacon back into the pan and stir to combine.
8. Serve the stir-fry hot, garnished with scallions.
9. Cook the Japanese rice according to package instructions.
10. Slice the scallions and chop the ginger and garlic.
11. Measure out the ingredients as needed.
